fast_summary._benchmark: 2026-06-13: Upgraded e4b→12b-unsloth based on model audition (fast_summary 3.1, 15-case battery stable). 2026-06-12: Tag fixed gemma4:e4b→gemma4:e4b-unsloth.
fast_summary._community_reputation: Gemma 4 is Google's lightweight model series. Unsloth variant required — native Ollama gemma4 tags blocked (temperature sensitivity causes empty responses at T≤0.7). See evals/model_audition/reports/profile_suggestions.md.

docs_agent._benchmark: 2026-06-13: Created from model audition (docs_agent 3.4, 15-case battery) + shadow dogfood (2/2 summaries non-empty, accurate, no over-expansion). 31B unsloth selected as primary.
docs_agent._community_reputation: Gemma 4 unsloth variants are stable for documentation roles. Native Ollama gemma4 tags blocked (temperature sensitivity T≤0.7 empty response). docs_agent is docs-only — must not edit non-.md files per agent definition.

smart_summary._community_reputation: Qwen3.5 distilled from Claude Opus. Hidden gem — small (9.5GB) but high-quality output. Confirmed 67.5s summarize on worker.py (2026-05-12 live test).

code_worker._benchmark: 105s test-plan, 20s review — dedicated coder, intelligence > speed (zero12)
code_worker._community_reputation: Qwen3-Coder Next is the latest in the Qwen3-Coder family, designed for agentic coding and multi-step programming tasks.

commit_reviewer._benchmark: 10s review - lightweight coder for commit-gate diff review (zero12)
commit_reviewer._community_reputation: Qwen3-Coder is purpose-built for agentic coding, tool use, and multi-step programming. Strong public benchmarks for code editing and agent tasks.
commit_reviewer._constraints: Must never use >30B or reasoning models for commit gate. Latency target: under 30s. Context: 16K (prioritize speed over context).

diff_reviewer._benchmark: 27s review + reasoning capability. Audition: nemotron not tested (TIMEOUT). Backup: qwen3.6:27b (15/15, 1424s dense).
diff_reviewer._community_reputation: Nemotron Nano Omni is NVIDIA's reasoning-augmented model. Community: 'good balance of reasoning depth and speed.' Backup qwen3.6:27b dense — slower but reliable.
diff_reviewer._constraints: Only for explicit non-commit-gate review calls. Not for commit gate (use commit_reviewer). ~39GB, may cause GPU swap.

deep_reviewer._benchmark: Audition 15/15, 417s. Core cases: tag drift 3.7, diff review 3.1, release gate 3.3. Community: 'first local model that saturated my benchmark.' Tag corrected 2026-06-12: qwen3.6:35b-q8-ud → qwen3.6:35b.
deep_reviewer._community_reputation: Qwen3.6 35B MoE (3B active/token). Widely regarded as strongest mid-size local model for coding and agentic tasks. Must set reasoning-budget to cap thinking tokens — community reports infinite reasoning loops without it.
deep_reviewer._constraints: Not for commit gate (>30B). Set reasoning-budget=4096 to cap thinking tokens and prevent unbounded loops.

heavy_reviewer._community_reputation: GPT-OSS 120B is a large open-source model. Good review quality for its size. Backup for Mistral Medium.
heavy_reviewer._constraints: Backup only. Prefer mistral-medium for release audit. Never in commit gate.

reasoning_checker._community_reputation: Qwen3.5 reasoning variant. Reliable for structured analysis. Top performer in local benchmarks (2/2 passed).
reasoning_checker._constraints: Not for commit gate. Use for explicit risk/logic/failure-mode tasks only.

deep_reasoning._benchmark: 140s risk analysis. distill variant confirmed working 2026-06-12. deepseek-r1:32b (non-distill) returns empty — likely Ollama R1 format issue.
deep_reasoning._community_reputation: DeepSeek R1 reasoning distilled into Qwen 32B. Official model card targets reasoning, math, and code. Strong community validation for deep analysis tasks.
deep_reasoning._constraints: CLI only. Only for architecture changes, security risks, root cause analysis. Never for commit gate or default routing.

translation._benchmark: 151s translate — only reliable option via MCP (zero12)
translation._community_reputation: GLM-4.7 Flash is the only CLI-verified translation model on this machine (151.4s, 2026-05-12 live test). translategemma-12b-it can translate via immersive plugin but the CLI prompt template does not trigger its translation behavior — prompt fix needed before it can be used as a faster alternative.

release_auditor._benchmark: Audition 15/15, 417s. Core cases: release gate 3.3, tag drift 3.7, diff review 3.1. Community: 'first local model that saturated my benchmark.'
release_auditor._community_reputation: Qwen3.6 35B MoE (3B active/token). Widely regarded as strongest mid-size local model. Strong agentic coding and release judgment. Must set reasoning-budget to prevent loops.
release_auditor._constraints: Release audit only. Must never enter commit gate or default review path. Set reasoning-budget to cap thinking tokens. Previous model mistral3.5:128b timed out in audition — kept as fallback candidate.

gemma4_26b_llamacpp._note: llama.cpp v387 (45b455e) on port 8080, -ngl 30 (GPU memory limited). Assistant drafter: gemma-4-26B-A4B-it-assistant.F16.gguf (816MB, ready for MTP when supported). Gemma 4 arch confirmed working with v387.

gemma4_26b._benchmark: 37.8s summarize-file — Gemma 4 26B A4B MoE, good mid-size generalist (zero12)

gemma4_26b_mtp._note: MTP-accelerated via llama.cpp. Uses assistant GGUF as speculative decoding drafter for ~1.5-2x speedup.

gemma4_31b._benchmark: Gemma 4 31B — Google's 31B flagship. Opus-distilled variant available. 32-35GB.
gemma4_31b._drafter: gemma-4-31B-it-assistant-F16.gguf (911MB, on zero12) — MTP ready when llama.cpp supports Gemma 4 MTP
gemma4_31b._status: available — Ollama (uses gemma4-31b-opus:latest, not standard gemma4:31b)

deepseek_r1_70b._benchmark: DeepSeek R1 distill 70B — stronger reasoning than 32B variant. Sits between deep_reasoning (32B) and release_auditor (128B).
deepseek_r1_70b._constraints: Not for commit gate. 70B model — deep reasoning and architecture only.
deepseek_r1_70b._status: unavailable — times out on API (>60s). Too slow for routing chains. Marked 2026-05-19.

nemotron_super._benchmark: Nemotron-3 Super — NVIDIA large reasoning model. Release-audit tier.
nemotron_super._constraints: Not for commit gate. Heavy model.

command_r._benchmark: Command-R 35B — Cohere mid-size generalist, good instruct following
command_r._constraints: Mid-size generalist. Good alternative to Qwen3.6 for summarization/suggestions.

mistral_119b_llamacpp._backend: Ollama (from GGUF via ollama create). BLOCKED: mistral4 arch not supported by Ollama's llama.cpp.
mistral_119b_llamacpp._launch: ollama create mistral-small-119b:q5 -f Modelfile (model loads but chat returns 500)
mistral_119b_llamacpp._status: unavailable — requires ollama llama.cpp update for mistral4 architecture

qwen3.6_27b_mtp._community_reputation: Qwen3.6 27B UD. Gated Delta Net (SSM) hybrid. Q8_0 via Ollama. Native MTP heads.
qwen3.6_27b_mtp._constraints: Not for commit gate. Ollama backend (llama.cpp MTP on port 8082 pending upstream Qwen3.6 tensor fix).
qwen3.6_27b_mtp._status: unavailable — llama.cpp MTP offline since v0.12.0 (pending upstream tensor fix)

qwen3.6_llamacpp._benchmark: 2026-06-21 measured: prompt 34 tok/s, gen 6 tok/s. 7K prompt OK. max_output_tokens=1024 min for content, 1536 stable, 2048+ timeout. Typical call 65-162s.
qwen3.6_llamacpp._community_reputation: Qwen3.6 27B GGUF resident on zero12. Managed by qwen36-llama.service (user systemd). Uses Radeon 8060S APU via ROCm — RTX 5070 Ti is free.
qwen3.6_llamacpp._constraints: Not for commit gate (65-162s, >30s target). --reasoning auto causes unbounded reasoning. Content only at max_tokens>=1024. Worker handles empty content via reasoning_content fallback.
qwen3.6_llamacpp._reasoning_behavior: --reasoning auto: content empty when max_tokens<=768. reasoning_content 2-4x max_tokens. Timeout risk above 2048.
qwen3.6_llamacpp._note: Unified gateway. Set LOCAL_LLM_API_KEY=sk-zero12-cluster in env.

qwen3.6_llamacpp_direct._backend: llama.cpp b9543 ROCm direct on zero12:8001
qwen3.6_llamacpp_direct._note: Debug/fallback only. Prefer qwen3.6_llamacpp (via LiteLLM) for normal use.

qwen3.6_35b_moe_mtp._benchmark: TBD — Qwen3.6 35B MoE UD with native MTP heads (~1.5-2x speedup via speculative decoding)
qwen3.6_35b_moe_mtp._community_reputation: Qwen3.6 35B MoE UD. Gated Delta Net (SSM) hybrid. Native MTP for fast inference.
qwen3.6_35b_moe_mtp._constraints: Not for commit gate (>30B). Ollama backend (llama.cpp MTP on port 8083 pending upstream Qwen3.6 tensor fix).
qwen3.6_35b_moe_mtp._status: unavailable — llama.cpp MTP offline since v0.12.0 (pending upstream tensor fix)

v4_flash_local_experimental._constraints: Manual invocation only. Not a default for any task. Requires explicit profile override. Model weights/binary must be provisioned separately.
v4_flash_local_experimental._community_reputation: Reserved local experimental profile. Provider is auto-detected from LOCAL_LLM_BASE_URL / LOCAL_LLM_PROVIDER; no tongyi provider is introduced.

deepseek_v4_flash_worker._constraints: Cloud only. Never auto-called. Only after 2 local failures or explicit --cloud-ok. Privacy gate must pass first.

deepseek_v4_flash_thinking._constraints: Cloud only. For tasks where Flash non-thinking is insufficient. Thinking mode adds cost.

deepseek_v4_pro_reviewer._constraints: Cloud only. NEVER for routine tasks. Only architecture/interface/release/arbitration. Must pass privacy gate. Controller must explicitly approve or task must be auto-classified as high-risk.

deepseek_v4_pro_planner._constraints: Cloud only. For architecture decisions and long-term design. Must pass privacy gate. Controller must explicitly request.

code_worker_llamacpp._benchmark: 2026-06-21: qwen3-coder:30b via llama.cpp. No reasoning overhead — direct code generation.
code_worker_llamacpp._constraints: Commit gate OK (under 30s). 16K ctx. Direct coder model, no reasoning delays.
code_worker_llamacpp._note: Unified gateway. Set LOCAL_LLM_API_KEY=sk-zero12-cluster in env.

commit_reviewer_llamacpp._benchmark: 2026-06-21: qwen3-coder:30b via llama.cpp. Fast code review, no reasoning overhead.
commit_reviewer_llamacpp._constraints: Commit gate. Latency target: under 30s. No reasoning model.
commit_reviewer_llamacpp._note: Unified gateway. Set LOCAL_LLM_API_KEY=sk-zero12-cluster in env.

gemma4_31b_llamacpp._benchmark: 2026-06-21: Gemma4 31B Q8_0 via llama.cpp. 6s load. Has reasoning but lighter than Qwen3.6. Good for summarization and docs.
gemma4_31b_llamacpp._constraints: 8K context. Has reasoning — worker handles via content fallback. Not for code generation or commit gate.
gemma4_31b_llamacpp._note: Unified gateway. Set LOCAL_LLM_API_KEY=sk-zero12-cluster in env.

diff_reviewer_llamacpp._benchmark: 2026-06-21: loads 28s. Nemotron Nano Omni, NVIDIA reasoning model.

deep_reasoning_llamacpp._benchmark: 2026-06-21: loads 18s. DeepSeek R1 distill 32B, reasoning specialist.

translation_llamacpp._benchmark: 2026-06-21: loads 14s. GLM-4.7 Flash, translation and CJK.

ollama.description: Default backend. All profiles except mistral_119b work via Ollama.

llama_cpp_mtp.description: llama.cpp with MTP speculative decoding. Requires manual server start.

native_mtp_models.qwen3.6_27b_mtp: Qwen3.6 has native MTP heads — no drafter needed
native_mtp_models.qwen3.6_35b_moe_mtp: Qwen3.6 MoE has native MTP heads — no drafter needed

llama_cpp_resident.description: llama.cpp resident Qwen3.6 27B service on zero12. Managed by systemd (qwen36-llama.service). Access via LiteLLM proxy (port 4000) or direct (port 8001).

_notes.method: solo testing (one model at a time, no GPU contention)
_notes.corrected_from_parallel_testing: qwen3.5-35b was TIMEOUT in parallel → 68s solo.
_notes.mtp_drafter_models: gemma assistant GGUF files are MTP speculative decoding drafters, NOT standalone models. Use via llama.cpp --mtp-head.
